command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=SERVICE HEALTH='
echo 'Branch:' $(git branch --show-current)
echo 'HEAD:' $(git log --oneline -1)
echo 'Wave1 tags:' $(git tag | grep wave1 | tr "\n" " ")

echo '=VERIFY ALL IMPORTS='
python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.')
import runtime.moreno_wave1_reliability as w
import runtime.moreno_governed_executor as e
import runtime.moreno_operator_bridge as b
print('wave1 version:', w.WAVE1_VERSION)
print('executor wave1 bg:', hasattr(e, '_run_background_governed_phase_wave1'))
print('executor wave1 build:', hasattr(e, 'build_executor_actions_wave1'))
print('bridge OK')
"

echo '=FINAL TEST RUN='
export PATH="$PATH:/home/jose/.local/bin"
python3 -m pytest tests/ -q 2>&1 | tail -3

echo '=GITEA PUSH MAIN='
git push http://044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6@192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI main 2>&1 | tail -5 || true

echo '=GITEA PUSH FORCE='
git push --force http://044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6@192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI main 2>&1 | tail -5

echo '=DONE='
ENDSSH
